executives.name: William Heissenbuttel
executives.background: Mr. Heissenbuttel has served as President and Chief Executive Officer since January 2020. He previously served as Chief Financial Officer and Vice President Strategy from 2018 to 2020, and Vice President Corporate Development from 2007 to 2018. He joined Royal Gold in 2006.

tenure_dates.title: Chief Financial Officer and Vice President Strategy

executives.name: Kevin McArthur
executives.background: Mr. McArthur has served as Chief Financial Officer and Treasurer since January 2020. He joined Royal Gold in 2018 as Vice President and Controller.

executives.name: Mark Isto
executives.background: Mr. Isto has served as Executive Vice President and Chief Operating Officer since January 2020. He joined Royal Gold in 2015 as Vice President Operations.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President and Chief Operating Officer

executives.name: Randy Shefman
executives.background: Mr. Shefman has served as Vice President and General Counsel since 2020. He joined Royal Gold in 2011.

executives.name: Daniel Breeze
executives.background: Mr. Breeze has served as Vice President, Corporate Development of RGLD Gold (Canada) since 2018. He joined Royal Gold in 2011.

board_of_directors.name: William Hayes
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Hayes has been a director since 2008 and Chairman of the Board since 2014. He was previously an executive at Placer Dome Inc.

board_of_directors.name: William Heissenbuttel
board_of_directors.background: President and CEO of Royal Gold, Inc.

board_of_directors.name: Fabiana Chubbs
board_of_directors.background: Ms. Chubbs was the CFO of Eldorado Gold Corporation from 2011 to 2018.

board_of_directors.name: Christopher Thompson
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Thompson was the Chairman and CEO of Gold Fields Ltd.

board_of_directors.name: Ronald Vance
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Vance was Senior Vice President, Corporate Development of Teck Resources Limited.

board_of_directors.name: Sybil Veenman
board_of_directors.background: Ms. Veenman was Senior Vice President and General Counsel of Barrick Gold Corporation.

sources.source_description: Royal Gold, Inc. Form 10-K for the fiscal year ended December 31, 2023
